title: BATTILO HOME Large Chenille Throw Blanket, 150X200cm Rust Orange Knitted Throws with Tassels, Lightweight Soft Cozy Couch Bed Chair Sofa Fringe Throw Blankets
features: MATERIAL - Blanket size 150X200cm, Made of 100% high quality polyester which is warmer than fleece, strong anti-sunlight and excellent light fastness, very soft and breathable at the same time.

FANTASTICAL DESGIN - This knitted throw blanket for couch nicely neutral solid knit design and well-arranged rustic farmhouse style fringes, it not only looks modern, classical but also offers you an amazing touch feeling. A perfect gift for your family and friends.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL BLANKET - With its 3.9" long fringe design, this lightweight blanket can be use as a shawl and scarf in outdoor. It can be used for spring throw blanket, it turns to be a cooling blanket in summer. Having this green throw blanket in autumn is always so elegant, what a dream fall throw blanket!

WHAT YOU CAN GET - Soft throws are very suitable for tasteful homeowners, classic but not tacky as a housewarming gift, you can have this comfy blanket as a gift for Christmas,Thanksgiving,Easter or other holidays. A good cozy blanket is a combination of right price, satisfactory adaptability,and cute design,bring this charming blanket home. Tip: Images may have chromatism.
EASY CARE - Machine wash with cold water separately on gentle/delicate cycle. Tumble dry on low heat. Avoid direct heat, No bleach.It is better to wash before first time use.
description: From the brand Battilo home, better home Decorative your home in Christmas mode with beautiful blankets. Previous page Softest Embrace, Purest Comfort.
